case_title: GUIDE PUBLISHING GROUP INC DBA BAY CITY GUIDE RESPONDENT VS. SAN FRANCISCO GUIDE, INC. APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING ON APPEAL
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JAN-28-2004 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF WED., 28JAN2004, BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEFFREY D. WOHL; CLERK: M. L. MANZELLA; REPORTER: NOT REPORTED (D-525).
MINUTES FOR JAN-28-2004 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 525
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED.

JUDGMENT ORDERED FOR DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO GUIDE, INC. AND AGAINST PLAINTIFF GUIDE PUBLISHING GROUP INC. DBA BAY CITY GUIDE FOR $0.00 PRINCIPAL, $0.00 ATTORNEY FEES, AND $86.00 COSTS; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. JUDGE PRO TEM JEFFREY D. WOHL; CLERK: MARJORIE MANZELLA; REPORTER: NOT REPORTED. (D-525, WED., 28JAN2004).
DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO GUIDE'S TRIAL BRIEF AND MOTION FOR NON-SUIT FILED BY APPELLANT SAN FRANCISCO GUIDE, INC. AS TO RESPONDENT GUIDE PUBLISHING GROUP INC DBA BAY CITY GUIDE
RECORD ON APPEAL JUDGEMENT FILED BY APPELLANT SAN FRANCISCO GUIDE, INC. AS TO RESPONDENT GUIDE PUBLISHING GROUP INC DBA BAY CITY GUIDE HEARING SET FOR JAN-28-2004 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT APPELLANT SAN FRANCISCO GUIDE, INC. RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT GUIDE PUBLISHING GROUP INC DBA BAY CITY GUIDE $86.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $86.00, SEE SCANNED DOC. ATTACHMENT TO JUDGMENT STATES: "THE COURT LACKS JURISDICTION TO HEAR THIS COPYRIGHT DISPUTE. THE JUDGMENT IS BASED ON LACK OF JURISDICTION ONLY, AND IS NOT AN ADJUDICATION OF THE MERITS OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM." SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
